sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44025" key="eu)quge/neios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθῠ-γένειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with straight beard</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
